Would it be correct to interpret that as the market wants to grind higher on low vol or am I off?

comment.body:
it is like...

vomma = selling kurtosis to the downside. they expect any downside move to be compressed, eaten up... left-tail is not fat.
downside vol selling is still there. so they don't really expect the market to go down... but they are 1) not as confident, 2) they expect moves like this exactly: downstick but controlled.
upside vol selling is way more, so they expect liquidity to be there, and market to stabilize there once it gets there. 
this is bullish in terms of expectations.. bcs this basically says: stability is upwards not downward. 

net positive speed profile = more emphasis on upside vol bets 

it does not predestinate the spot movements, but it does the sentiment. also if something discrepancy happens, that could break teh sentiment
